valueMarkdown.value: Cancer Condition example for the *Varian ARIA API Cancer Condition Profile.*

div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: code: Diagnosis Display text FHIR Verification (ICD-9-CM (procedure codes)#170.8 "Malignant neoplasm of short bones of lower limb")

tr.td: Diagnosis Method Text by FHIR Verification (diagnosis-method#X-ray "X-ray")

div.p: note: Diagnosis created by FHIR Verification Test !!!

blockquote.p: value: Tumor confined within the cortex (diagnosis-stage-type#T1)
value: Tumor can not be assessed/determined (diagnosis-stage-type#TX)
value: No regional lymph node metastasis (diagnosis-stage-type#N0)
value: No evidence of primary tumor (diagnosis-stage-type#T0)

display.value: Malignant neoplasm of short bones of lower limb

text.value: Diagnosis Method Text by FHIR Verification
Diagnosis created by FHIR Verification Test !!!
